description: CLO tranche and leveraged loan pricer sharing the same floating-rate projection engine. For clo_tranche: models a two-phase CLO (reinvestment + amortisation) with pool-level CDR defaults, a simplified OC-test waterfall, and sequential principal distribution. For leveraged_loan: prices a single amortising floating-rate loan (TLB/TLA/unitranche) using the same forward-rate curve, with optional SOFR/Euribor floor and TLB-style scheduled amortisation.

required_fields.name: instrument_type
required_fields.description: Payoff structure — determines which fields are required

required_fields.name: credit_spread_bp
required_fields.description: Z-spread (clo_tranche) or discount margin (leveraged_loan) over the benchmark curve in basis points. For a floating-rate loan the z-spread equals the DM when projecting and discounting off the same curve.

required_fields.name: pool_par_balance
required_fields.description: [clo_tranche only] Current outstanding pool par balance

required_fields.name: pool_was
required_fields.description: [clo_tranche only] Weighted average spread of the collateral pool over the reference rate (decimal or %, e.g. 0.035 = 3.50%)

required_fields.name: pool_cdr
required_fields.description: [clo_tranche only] Annual conditional default rate of the pool (decimal or %, e.g. 0.02 = 2%)

required_fields.name: reinvestment_end_date
required_fields.description: [clo_tranche only] End of the reinvestment period (DD-MM-YYYY or YYYY-MM-DD). During reinvestment, pool principal is recycled and investors receive only interest.

required_fields.name: tranche_balance
required_fields.description: [clo_tranche only] Outstanding notional of the tranche being priced

required_fields.name: tranche_spread
required_fields.description: [clo_tranche only] Spread of this tranche over the reference rate (decimal or %, e.g. 0.0135 = 135 bp)

required_fields.name: oc_threshold
required_fields.description: [clo_tranche only] Overcollateralisation ratio trigger (e.g. 1.25 = 125%). If pool_balance / total_rated_notes falls below this level, junior interest is diverted to senior principal.

required_fields.name: credit_support_pct
required_fields.description: [clo_tranche only] Total subordination below this tranche as % of pool balance (equity + junior tranches). Absorbs credit losses before they reach this tranche.

required_fields.name: loan_balance
required_fields.description: [leveraged_loan only] Outstanding principal of the loan

required_fields.name: spread
required_fields.description: [leveraged_loan only] Spread over the reference rate (SOFR/Euribor) (decimal or %, e.g. 0.04 = S+400 bp)

optional_fields.name: coupon_frequency
optional_fields.description: Payment frequency (default Quarterly — standard for both CLO tranches and leveraged loans)

optional_fields.name: currency
optional_fields.description: Settlement currency (e.g. EUR, USD) — used for benchmark discount curve selection

optional_fields.name: pool_recovery_rate
optional_fields.description: [clo_tranche only] Recovery rate on defaulted loans (default 0.65 = 65%)

optional_fields.name: pool_cpr
optional_fields.description: [clo_tranche only] Annual voluntary loan prepayment / repayment rate during the amortisation phase (default 0.15 = 15%)

optional_fields.name: pool_wal
optional_fields.description: [clo_tranche only] Expected WAL of remaining pool collateral after the reinvestment period ends, in years. Used to derive the linear amortisation rate in the amortisation phase (default 3.0)

optional_fields.name: equity_pct
optional_fields.description: [clo_tranche only] Equity / first-loss tranche as % of pool balance. Used to derive total_rated_notes = pool_balance × (1 − equity_pct/100) for the OC test denominator (default 10.0)

optional_fields.name: senior_notes_balance
optional_fields.description: [clo_tranche only] Aggregate outstanding balance of tranches senior to this one. Senior tranches receive all pool principal first in the sequential waterfall (default 0 = this is the most senior rated tranche)

optional_fields.name: tranche_is_senior
optional_fields.description: [clo_tranche only] True if this is the most senior rated tranche. When True, OC test failures accelerate principal to this tranche rather than deferring its interest (default False)

optional_fields.name: management_fee_bp
optional_fields.description: [clo_tranche only] Senior management fee in basis points per annum deducted from pool income before the interest waterfall (default 25 bp)

optional_fields.name: floor_rate
optional_fields.description: [leveraged_loan only] Reference rate floor (e.g. 0.005 = 50 bp SOFR floor). The effective rate each period is max(forward_rate, floor_rate). Floor-active periods are flagged in the output (default 0 = no floor)

optional_fields.name: annual_amortisation_pct
optional_fields.description: [leveraged_loan only] Scheduled principal amortisation per year as a percentage of the original loan_balance. 1.0 = TLB convention (1% p.a. amortisation, remainder as bullet at maturity). Set to 0 for a pure bullet loan (default 1.0)
